The missing move is **\boxed{d8d4}**, completing the sequence of the **Queen's Gambit Declined (Tarrasch Variation)** where Black's queen sacrifices on d4 to force a draw by perpetual check.

The game ends in a draw due to the repetition of the **d4-d8/d8-d4** queen moves with White's king on d1 and Black's king on e8, creating a perpetual check pattern. The last move before the draw was **e4g2**, so **d8d4** is the logical response to maintain the repetition.
